race.comment: BLISTERING (4) is going well, finding the line strongly here over 1415m behind Test Of Love who has won again in town since. A mile is no issue for this mare and she draws for every hope. She'll be very hard to hold out again and can go one better. HOTEI SENSHI (2) debuted at Wangaratta over 1400m and proved far too strong, coming from off the pace to win well as favourite. He should relish this trip and can measure up with natural progression. PROSHOW (3) proved too strong first up at Werribee in a BM56 with 61kg, clearly having come back well. He stays at a mile which is a little niggle but will be fitter and should find the right part of the track. ALL TORQUE (7) can be better suited coming back in trip having struggled to see out 2100m last time.
